title: oberonia surigaensis
intro: Oberonia surigaensis is a species of orchid native to the Philippines, classified as a type of epiphytic orchid that grows on trees. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Oberonia surigaensis include its potential to treat various infections and inflammatory diseases, as well as its antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations often involving the use of the plant's leaves and roots to create teas, tinctures, and other medicinal extracts.
